name: Mage General Warstaff
description: Kasper Stern, a legendary sorcerer and mentor at the Maen Academy, lived about a century ago and was an exceptionally versatile individual. Conrad II Ironhand held the mage in such high esteem that he entrusted him with leading a part of the royal army - an unprecedented decision!
descriptionZh: 大约一百年前，曼恩学院有一教师，名作卡斯珀·斯滕，既长于咒法，又深谙军法与治政之道，鲜有人出其右，逝后成为传奇法师。“铁手”康拉德二世彼时对其欣赏有加，命其执掌先王麾下一部，开历史之先河！
